A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly queried the right symbols and computed the 2008 average volumes, but in execute_python:70/108/144 it used naive string splitting on "Company Description" (e.g., desc.split(',')[0]) to extract names—dropping suffixes like ", Inc." and ", Ltd."—and then returned extra formatted text with financial status, so the final company names/output formatting did not match the ground-truth CSV.

FM1: no
